title: NexusDB Relations Entry Schema
description: Schema for a single entry in the relations frontmatter list

target.description: Canonical title or concept_id of the target note

type.description: The semantic relationship type (one of 18 controlled vocabulary types)

confidence.description: Confidence in the relationship (0-100). Relationships with confidence < 80 are not created automatically.

reason.description: Brief explanation of why this relationship exists

evidence.description: Optional: quote or section reference supporting the relationship

source.description: Optional: slug or path of the source that implies this relationship

human_verified.description: Whether a human has confirmed this relationship is correct
